passives.name: Excoriate
passives.effects: Gain a random amount of {{as|'''bonus''' critical strike damage|critical damage}} that scales up to {{as|50% of your critical strike chance}}, with the value of this amount changing every {{fd|0.25}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Gain a random amount of bonus critical strike damage that scales up to 50% of your critical strike chance, changing every 0.25 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Excoriate continuously rerolls bonus critical-strike-damage contribution every 0.25 seconds while equipped, scaling to a maximum tied to current critical-strike chance.
Player-visible behavior: crit-damage output fluctuates over time even without casting or hitting, so burst windows depend on random roll timing at hit resolution.
Patch-history verification confirms the current maximum scaling coefficient represented here.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
